Metadata.title: Zupet — The complete app to care for your pet
Metadata.description: Zupet brings together health records, vaccines, travel passport, expense tracking, smart reminders and a photo album for your pet. Free download on Google Play.
Metadata.ogDescription: Health records, vaccines, travel passport, expenses and reminders for your pet, all in one place. Free download on Google Play.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Health records, travel passport, expense tracking and smart reminders for your pet. Free on Google Play.

Hero.subtitle: Vaccines, vet visits, feeding, photos — all in one place. Never forget anything important about who you love most.
Hero.androidAria: Download Zupet for Android on Google Play
Hero.iosAria: Download Zupet for iOS — coming soon
Hero.footnote: Free • Direct download on Google Play Store

Audiences.subtitle: No matter how many pets you have or how you care for them — Zupet adapts to you.

multiPet.title: Multi-pet households
multiPet.description: Register dogs, cats and other species on the same account. Each pet with its own history, vaccines and reminders — nothing gets mixed up.

seniorPet.title: Senior pets or special care
seniorPet.description: Track weight, ongoing medications and frequent vet visits. A complete history you can show your vet in seconds.

traveler.title: Owners who travel with their pet
traveler.description: Travel passport with checklists for car, domestic or international flights. Never forget a required document or vaccine.

Features.subtitle: From daily feeding logs to a complete medical history.

health.title: Health Records
health.description: Vaccines, vet visits, medications and exams gathered in one complete document with a QR Code to share with your vet.

travel.title: Travel Passport
travel.description: Plan trips with your pet. Smart checklist for car, domestic and international flights — never forget a document.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Personalized notifications for vaccines, vet visits and medications. The app warns you before they're due and reschedules automatically.

album.title: Tagged Photo Album
album.description: Organize your pet's photos by category — vet, walk, birthday, bath. Memories that last forever.

expenses.title: Expense Tracking
expenses.description: Log expenses for vet visits, food, baths and accessories. See the monthly summary and how much you invest in each pet.

feeding.title: Feeding Management
feeding.description: Track food stock with restock alerts. Never let the bowl run empty again.

achievements.title: Achievements & Challenges
achievements.description: Earn achievements by taking great care of your pets. Weekly challenges make the care routine more fun and motivating.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: Access your pet's full history without internet. Syncs automatically to the cloud when connected — with secure backup.

Screenshots.subtitle: Every screen designed to be intuitive from the first use. Click any image to zoom in.

Availability.subtitle: Works offline, syncs automatically, protected with social login. Caring for your pet shouldn't depend on a connection.
Availability.offlineFeature: Full offline mode — works without internet
Availability.loginFeature: Login with Google and Apple — secure and fast
Availability.androidDesc: Free download on Google Play Store

Download.title: Download Zupet
Download.description: Zupet is available on the <googlePlay>Google Play Store</googlePlay>. Download for free and start caring for your pet with much more organization.
Download.subdescription: Sign up, add your pets and have their entire history in the palm of your hand — vaccines, vet visits, photos and much more.
Download.step1Desc: Go to the Google Play Store and install Zupet for free on your Android.
Download.step2Desc: Create your profile, add your pets and personalize with photo, breed and health information.
Download.step3Desc: Log vaccines, reminders, photos and achievements. Everything organized in one place.

FAQ.subtitle: The most common questions from pet owners answered here.
FAQ.deleteAccountDesc: Access the form and request complete removal of your data.

items.a: Yes, download and basic use are completely free. Register your pets, log vaccines, feeding and photos without paying anything.
Yes. Zupet works in offline mode and syncs automatically when you reconnect. You never lose data.

items.q: How many pets can I register?
items.a: As many as you want. Dogs, cats, birds, rabbits — multiple pets and species on the same account.
Yes. Data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share personal information with third parties.

items.q: Can I use it on more than one device?
items.a: Yes. Sign in with Google or Apple on any device and your data will always stay in sync.
Zupet is available for Android on the Google Play Store. The iOS version is in development and coming soon to the App Store.

items.q: How can I delete my account and data?
items.a: You can delete your account directly in the app under Profile → Settings → Delete account, or use our online form at zupet.io/excluir-conta. All your data is permanently removed within 7 business days.

FinalCta.description: Join {count} pet owners who already use Zupet to keep their pets healthy and happy.

Footer.madeWith: made with ❤️ for owners who love their pets

Legal.noticeTitle: This document is only available in Portuguese
Legal.noticeDesc: As a legal document governed by Brazilian law (LGPD), we keep the official content in Portuguese only.

DeleteAccount.successDesc: We received your account deletion request. We'll process it within 7 business days and send a confirmation to your email.
DeleteAccount.successContact: If you have questions, contact us: {email}
DeleteAccount.duplicateDesc: There's already a pending request for this email. Our team is processing your request.
DeleteAccount.formDesc: By requesting deletion, all your data will be permanently removed — including profile, pets, diary, documents and photos. This action cannot be undone.
DeleteAccount.reasonPlaceholder: Tell us why, so we can improve the app...
DeleteAccount.preferAppNotice: Prefer to delete via the app? Go to Profile → Settings → Delete account.
